en_title: Xbox's New Console, Project Helix, Will Reportedly Not Have a Disc Drive; Microsoft Exploring Ways to Digitize Physical Games
cn_title: XBOX新主机Project Helix据称无光驱，微软探索实体盘数字化
subtitle: 光盘退场前夜
opus_summary: 新报道称，代号Project Helix的下一代XBOX可能不配备光驱。微软还在探索光盘转数字授权功能，让玩家把实体盘转为数字许可，但这也会限制转售和借出。

paragraphs.en: According to new reports, Xbox may be moving way from physical media with a console currently known as Project Helix .
paragraphs.cn: 根据新报道，XBOX可能正通过一台目前名为Project Helix的主机远离实体媒介。

paragraphs.en: Windows Central revealed that its sources say that Project Helix, the next-generation Xbox, will not feature a disc drive. No further details were provided, but the news came after PlayStation revealed it will no longer be producing or supporting physical game discs starting in January 2028 . This suggests that the PlayStation 6 won't come with a disc drive, and that Sony is planning to embrace an all-digital future .
paragraphs.cn: Windows Central透露，其消息源称Project Helix，也就是下一代XBOX，将不会配备光驱。报道没有提供更多细节，但这条消息出现在PlayStation宣布将从2028年1月起停止生产和支持实体游戏光盘之后。这暗示PS6可能不会配备光驱，而索尼正计划拥抱全数字未来。

paragraphs.en: The Verge added onto the news cycle by reporting that Microsoft is exploring a new disc-to-digital feature. This would allow users to put a disc into their console and gain a digital license for the game, giving them the ability to play it without a disc. If the owner gives the disc to someone else, that entitlement then transfers to the new player. This essentially means you can't resell or loan your physical copy to a friend if you want to keep the digital version. The discs will still work as normal if you choose not to digitize it.
paragraphs.cn: The Verge随后补充报道称，微软正在探索一种新的光盘转数字功能。该功能允许用户把光盘放入主机，并获得该游戏的数字许可，从而无需光盘即可游玩。如果拥有者把光盘交给其他人，这份权益就会转移给新玩家。这本质上意味着，如果你想保留数字版，就不能把实体版转卖或借给朋友。如果你选择不把光盘数字化，光盘仍会照常工作。

paragraphs.en: The report also notes that this will only apply to Xbox One and Xbox Series X|S games. Original Xbox and Xbox 360 titles will not be supported with this feature. The Verge was unable to speak to rumors of whether or not Project Helix will have a disc drive, but speculated that this new feature may be a way for users to start preparing for an all-digital Xbox. If players want the next version of the console, they may be able to start digitizing their library on their current one.
paragraphs.cn: 报道还指出，这项功能只适用于XBOX One和XBOX Series X|S游戏。初代XBOX和XBOX 360游戏不会支持该功能。The Verge无法确认Project Helix是否会配备光驱的传闻，但推测这个新功能可能是让用户开始为全数字XBOX做准备的一种方式。如果玩家想要下一代主机，他们或许可以先在现有主机上开始数字化自己的游戏库。

paragraphs.en: This generation, console manufacturers gave players the choice on how they buy their games. If you are uninterested in discs, you can buy digital-only variants of both Xbox Series X and PS5. However, you can also buy a console with a disc drive included, or in the case of the PS5, buy an attachable disc drive for the digital-only variant of the console. Although it's certainly possible that future consoles could have an optional disc drive to support physical backward compatible titles, it's hardly a guarantee at this point.
paragraphs.cn: 这一代主机上，硬件厂商给了玩家选择购买方式的空间。如果你对光盘不感兴趣，可以购买XBOX Series X和PS5的纯数字版本。不过，你也可以买带光驱的主机，或者在PS5的情况下，为纯数字版主机购买可拆卸光驱。虽然未来主机当然可能拥有可选光驱，以支持实体向下兼容游戏，但目前这绝不是板上钉钉。

paragraphs.en: As of right now, Xbox has yet to make any official comment or stance on the future of physical media. Microsoft has confirmed that it will , though it's unclear how detailed those details will be. It's expected that both consoles will release next year , though there are concerns over the viability of that, given the cost to produce these pieces of hardware.
paragraphs.cn: 截至目前，XBOX尚未就实体媒介的未来发表任何官方评论或立场。微软已经确认它会推出下一代XBOX硬件，不过目前尚不清楚届时会透露多少细节。预计两台主机都会在明年发售，但考虑到这些硬件的生产成本，外界也担心这一计划是否可行。

paragraphs.en: Ultimately, with pricing, lack of options for physical media fans, and an overall feeling that this generation hasn't even reached its full potential, the next-generation is sounding rather unattractive. Perhaps there's a way to hook players in with the next line of consoles, but right now, it's becoming an increasingly harder sell.
paragraphs.cn: 归根结底，定价、实体媒介爱好者缺少选择，再加上这一代主机整体还没有完全发挥潜力的感觉，都让下一代主机听起来并不太有吸引力。或许下一代主机仍有办法吸引玩家入坑，但现在，它正变得越来越难卖。
